sentences.arabic: فِي نِهَايَةِ العَامِ الدِّرَاسِيِّ نَجَحَ جَمِيعُ الطُّلَّابِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju školske godine svi učenici su prošli.
sentences.translationEn: At the end of the school year all students passed.

sentences.translation: Porodice su se obradovale uspjehu svoje djece.
sentences.translationEn: The families were happy about their children's success.

sentences.translation: Škola je organizovala malu proslavu čestitanja.
sentences.translationEn: The school organized a small celebration.

sentences.translation: Učenici su se oprostili od nastavnika i zahvalili im.
sentences.translationEn: The students said goodbye to their teachers and thanked them.

sentences.arabic: وَعَدُوا بِالعَوْدَةِ فِي السَّنَةِ الدِّرَاسِيَّةِ القَادِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Obećali su da će se vratiti sljedeće školske godine.
sentences.translationEn: They promised to return in the next school year.
